title: OptiMind Daily Log
description: Canonical schema for daily/YYYY-MM-DD.json — the structured per-day record holding today's protocol (the morning-brief-generated plan) plus the structured log (sleep/meals/caffeine/snacks/routine/workouts) captured from the dashboard. One file per day in optimind-journal, alongside journal/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Authoritative for numeric values; every field written here is mirrored to journal/<date>.md as a Dashboard-role line (see journal_entry.schema.md §Role write contract). Routine/protocol item ids use the snake_case form of the canonical grep keywords in journal_entry.schema.md (e.g. cold_shower, deep_work) — do not invent synonyms.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump via a migrations/daily_log_<from>to<to>.py script.

date.description: The user's LOCAL date (US/Eastern by default), matching the journal/<date>.md filename. Never a bare-UTC-derived date.

tz.description: IANA timezone the date and all HH:MM times are expressed in (e.g. America/New_York).

protocol.description: The plan for the day, regenerated each morning by the morning-brief Routine (§7.4). Absent until generated.

generated_at.description: When this protocol was generated. ISO-8601 with explicit offset; bare 'Z' is banned.

source.description: Provenance: default fallback, a mobile-chat override the user requested for today, or derived from user_profile rules + state.

log.description: Structured log captured during the day. All sub-fields optional — a day may be partially logged.

routine.description: Map of routine-item id (snake_case canonical keyword) → completion record.

LocalTime.description: 24-hour HH:MM local time in the file's tz.

OffsetDateTime.description: ISO-8601 datetime that MUST carry an explicit numeric offset. Bare 'Z' (UTC) is rejected by the pattern, matching the timezone binding enforced in user_profile.schema.json and journal_entry.schema.md.

ItemId.description: snake_case id; use the canonical grep keyword from journal_entry.schema.md (cold_shower, deep_work, sleep, caffeine, meal, workout, sauna, sunlight, meditation, ...).
